Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Responses To Supplemental Interrogatories And Req.'S For Production
Off Calendar Jan-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. David L, Fiol of Brent, Fiol & Nolan LLP, (415)259-4420, appearing for plaintiff.
Atty. William A. Bogdan of Lynch, Gilardi & Grummer, (415)397-2800 appearing for defendant.

Ruling - Argued; DEFENDANTS WEBCOR CONSTRUCTION L.P., CUPERTINO ELECTRIC, INC, ANDREW M JORDAN, INC DBA A & B CONSTRUCTION, BRAND ENERGY SERVICES OF CALIFORNIA, INC's MOTION To Compel Responses To Supplemental Interrogatories And Req.'S For Production, parties stipulated to have matter heard by Judge Pro Tem. The court adopted tentative ruling as following: It appearing that there is no opposition to defendants' Webcor Construction, LP, Cupertino Electric, Inc, Andres M Jordan, Inc. DBA A&B Construction and Brand Energy Services of California, Inc. motion to compel responses to Supplemental Interrogatories and Requests for Production of Document and good cause appearing therefore:
IT IS HEREBY ORDERED: (1) Plaintiff will provide complete, properly verified responses the Supplemental Interrogatories and Requests for Production of Documents without objections to defendants no later than February 7, 2012.
(2) If Plaintiff fails to provide such responses to the Supplemental Interrogatories and Requests for Production of Documents within the time specified in Paragraph (1) above, Plaintiff will be precluded at trial for presenting any evidence beyond the evidence shown in response to the initial interrogatories and the initial request for production of documents."
Order signed in open court. Paul Renne Judge Pro Tem, not reported - 302/JPT
